title: Would
description: Trees With Purpose. New trees for biomes without unique woods and more.
body:
![Large banner stating "WOULD".](https://i.imgur.com/ndRPi5Q.png)
*Trees With Purpose.*
# What's Would?
Would adds 16* new trees to color in parts of Minecraft's overworld that need a little more love. Each tree is unique and interesting, but still feel like it's from the same game as the vanilla ones. Trees go from just replacing placeholder oaks like in swamps and badlands to being treasures in themselves like the elusive Blue Spruce and the luxurious Ebony.

### REQUIRES MOONLIGHT!

![Vine divider stating "COMPAT"](https://i.imgur.com/WyNpy6N.png)
Would has built-in compat for:
 - Wood Good, Quark, Woodworks, and other mods that add wooden block variants.
 - Dynamic Trees
 - Biome mods (given they tag their biomes right)

![vine divider by The Bobbu stating "features"](https://i.imgur.com/YnRxEo4.png)
Would replaces non-unique biome trees with:
 - **Aspen** replacing tall birch in old growth birch forests.
 - **Bald Cypress** replacing 'swamp oak' in swamps.
 - **Cedar** replacing oak in wooded badlands.
 - **Mahogany** replacing small jungle trees in sparse jungles.
 - **Pine** replacing spruce trees in old growth pine forests.

Would also adds trees that spice up certain environments:
 - Our **Azalea** has a unique woodset and generates in groves above lush caves.
 - **Baobab** providing spectacle in savannas.
 - **Maple** growing alongside vanilla trees in forests and cherry groves.
 - **Palm** growing on beaches and near water in deserts.
 - **Walnut**
 - **Willow** growing over lakes.

Finally, Would adds a few rare trees as rewards:
 - **Blue Spruce** being found only in the planter pot in igloos.
 - **Ebony** being found very rarely in sparse jungles.

![Vine divider stating "CREDITS"](https://i.imgur.com/gpC2puj.png)
- [Kayla the Bee](https://modrinth.com/user/Kayla_the_Bee) for the mod's textures.
- [Ordana](https://modrinth.com/user/Ordana) for code, idea, and implementation.
- [The Bobbu](https://modrinth.com/user/Bobisnotaperson) for the icon, banner, and dividers.
- [MehVahdJukaar](https://modrinth.com/user/MehVahdJukaar) for invaluable code advice.
- [eldabys](https://modrinth.com/user/eldabys5) for project management and toad wrangling.

![Vine divider by the Bobbu](https://i.imgur.com/g3DorAO.png)
Please include in modpacks! if you do you can talk about it on our *discord*.
#### Would is best paired with:
[**![Verdant](https://i.imgur.com/GiUOrEz.png)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/verdant-mod "Verdant") [**![Grounded](https://i.imgur.com/2RZegG8.png)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/grounded "Grounded") [**![Oxide](https://i.imgur.com/dFua2iK.png)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/verdant-mod "Oxide")
